zh.Powys, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Cherleton於大約1352年出生在英國肯特武爾可姆時，她的父親John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis18歲，母親Joan II Stafford10歲。她於1374年與Arnold St Leger在英國肯特武爾可姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1425年9月17日在英國英格蘭肯特武爾可姆享年74歲，埋葬在英國肯特武爾可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Cherleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Charlton
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from North Charlton or Charlton near Bellingham (both Northumberland) or from any of the many other places so named (there are over ninety examples in England), from Old English Ceorlatūn ‘settlement (Old English tūn) of the peasants’. Old English ceorl denoted originally a free peasant of the lowest rank, later (but probably already before the Norman conquest) a tenant in pure villeinage, a serf or bondsman.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Cherleton was born about 1352, in Ulcombe, Kent, England, her father, John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis, was 18 and her mother, Joan II Stafford, was 10. She married Arnold St Leger in 1374, in Ulcombe, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 17 September 1425, in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Ulcombe, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Cherleton est née environ 1352, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Joan II Stafford, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Arnold St Leger en 1374, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 septembre 1425, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Cherletonが約1352年にイギリスケントウルコンベで生まれた時，父John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powisは18歳，母Joan II Staffordは10歳であった。1374年にイギリスケントウルコンベでArnold St Legerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1425年9月17日にイギリスイギリスケントウルコンベで74歳で死去し，イギリスケントウルコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Cherleton(이)가 대략 1352년 영국 켄트 울코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan II Stafford(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 1374년 영국 켄트 울코브에서 Arnold St Leger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 9월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 울코브에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 울코브에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Arnold St Leger em 1374, em Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Cherleton родилась около 1352 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan II Stafford, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Arnold St Leger в 1374 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 сентября 1425 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия.
